strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume despite being required stack
Lack of clear evidence of Kotlin or Java usage in enterprise backend services (only DLang/C++ mentioned)
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK, and explicitly mentions contributing to AI-agent infrastructure — directly matching core requirements. However, there is no evidence of experience with Nest.js or Vitest, both required technologies, and while Java/Kotlin are listed in skills, no project evidence shows enterprise usage. The absence of these key stack components significantly impacts fit despite strong overall experience.
